name: YubiHSM
description: YubiHSM — compact, cost-effective hardware security module from Yubico for digital key storage.

seo.title: YubiHSM — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: YubiHSM: YubiHSM — compact, cost-effective hardware security module from Yubico for digital key storage.

when_to_use: HSM-backed secret storage for certificate signing operations
PKCS#11 interface for application-level cryptographic operations
Code signing key protection for software release pipelines
SSH CA key storage with YubiHSM-backed signing
Compact HSM for small-team PKI without rack-mounted hardware

pros: Compact, USB-based HSM with real crypto
cons: Single USB form factor limits HA
review.verdict: The best small-form-factor HSM for most teams; just don't expect datacenter-grade throughput.
review.best_for: Teams needing real HSM-backed keys without six-figure hardware budgets.
review.not_for: High-TPS signing workloads that need network HSMs.
